Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Aww, it's so pretty! This is wonderful...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Yeah... I could look at this all night long.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Did you know they brought in a famous designer for these decorations?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Here, I have a present for you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}It's been a while since I've made something like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I never thought we'd end up spending Christmas together like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I was just so used to being all on my own.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I'm only gonna tell you this because it's a special day, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I actually always dreamed of doing something like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I know that with everything going on, it's not exactly the time to be getting all warm and fuzzy...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 40 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 0 0 0 0}Just for today... I want to be by your side.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shared a tender moment with Yukari.[n]{f 1 1}
